title: Pride & Groom Multipurpose Pet Wipes with Aloe Vera and Vitamin E | Biodegradable Grooming Wipe - Perfect for Eyes, Ears, Paws & Bottoms - Fragrance & Alcohol Free (30 Wipes)
features: SAFE FOR SENSITIVE AREAS: Designed to be extra gentle, these dog ear wipes are alcohol-free and fragrance-free. They’re perfect for freshening up around delicate eyes and bottoms without causing irritation.

MULTIPURPOSE EVERYDAY CLEANING: These dog wipes are ideal for daily use on eyes, ears, paws and bottoms. Perfect after walks, meals or messy garden adventures, they gently lift dirt while soothing skin.
INFUSED WITH NATURAL GOODNESS: Each pet wipe is enriched with aloe vera and vitamin E to nourish and protect. Whether cleaning dusty paws or wiping around the ears, skin stays soft and comfortable.
HELPS REMOVE LOOSE HAIR: These grooming wipes for dogs also help tackle loose hairs during shedding season. Use before brushing to reduce fluff on floors and keep coats smoother between grooms.
BIODEGRADABLE & PLANET-FRIENDLY: Made with 100% viscose plant fibres, these biodegradable dog wipes are an eco-conscious choice. Dispose of them responsibly and feel good with every wipe.
NO NASTIES, JUST KINDNESS: Free from alcohol and artificial fragrance, these gentle wipes are kind to both pets and noses. Perfect for dogs who dislike strong scents or have sensitive skin.
FRESHENS IN BETWEEN BATHS: Ideal for quick clean-ups in between washes, these wipes keep dogs looking and smelling fresh. Use after park play, rainy walks or car rides to restore freshness fast.
SUPPORTS GOOD EAR HYGIENE: These make an excellent ear cleaner for dogs as part of a weekly routine. Gently wipe around the outer ear to help keep wax and debris under control.
HANDY FOR AT-HOME OR TRAVEL: With 30 wipes per pack, they’re the perfect size to pop in a bag or car. A great addition to any dog accessories kit for on-the-go grooming emergencies.
ESSENTIAL PET SUPPLIES ITEM: A must-have in any grooming collection, these pet wipes pair perfectly with other dog supplies. Use them with brushes, shampoos and sprays for all-round care.
description: Product Description Keep your pup looking and feeling their best with Pride & Groom Multipurpose Pet Wipes – a gentle, plant-based solution for everyday hygiene. Made from 100% viscose plant fibres, these biodegradable dog wipes are kind to the planet and even kinder to sensitive skin. Infused with soothing aloe vera and nourishing vitamin E, they help care for delicate areas like the eyes, ears, paws and bottoms without irritation. Whether freshening up after muddy walks or tackling those pesky tear stains, these fragrance-free, alcohol-free wipes are safe to use all over. Ideal as a quick clean-up in between baths or as a handy addition to any dog grooming kit, they’re perfect for everyday use at home or on the go. Gentle yet effective, these wipes also help remove loose hairs and daily dirt, keeping coats clean, soft and comfortable. A must-have in any collection of grooming products for dogs, these multipurpose dog wipes are designed to make life cleaner – and cuddles fresher. Directions For best results brush pet before use. Wipe around the head and from neck to tail to remove excess hairs and dirt.
